message:
🐛 Fix auto-qa workflow not adding ai-fix-requested label to all issues (#125)

9 issue types in auto-qa.yml were missing the ai-fix-requested and
help wanted labels, which prevented the ai-fix.yml workflow from
triggering Copilot to generate fix PRs automatically.

Added ai-fix-requested and help wanted labels to all issue creation
blocks: npm audit, error boundary, React.memo, hardcoded secrets,
XSS risk, responsive layout, TODO items, PWA features, and test
coverage.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
